g.text: Push open the {ENTRANCE_DOOR} and go in.
Study the three faults with Junia.
Climb the frame to free the jammed {T1B_...
Temper it in the quench, the slow sure w...
Fit it green and race the clock.
Set the hardened {T1A_TOOL} and watch th...
Trust the math and lock the weights.
Chase perfection with one more weight.
Watch the pendulum find its stride.
Learn the three ways to catch the true e...
Trace the {T2_FALSEECHO} to its source h...
Sit the {T2_FOCUSSTONE} and sift the wor...
Close in on the loud horn.
Re-aim the horn to cancel the {T2_FALSEE...
Pull the baffle and silence the {T2A_TOO...
Call the last of the message.
Trust {T2_MENTOR} and stay inside the ra...
Trust the voice and cross onto the old g...
Grab for the rail as the gantry gives.
Look over the failing works with {T3_MEN...
Pick a way to hold the pressure.
Dive to find and plug the leaking seam.
Work the hand-pumps to refill the tank.
Shut the {T3C_TOOL} on the leaking secti...
Feel along the main for the leak.
Set the {T3A_CLAMP}, the strong slow fix...
Hold the pace against the clock.
Pump the tank the last of the way full.
Let the full tank feed the signal.
Set both hands to the frozen wheel.
Brace it slow and steady with {T3_MENTOR...
Throw all your weight against it at once...
Walk the wheel around, turn by turn.
Scramble back from the failing valve.
Choose a route to the jammed capsule.
Crawl the service duct and clear the jam...
Reroute the air pressure to blow it free...
Send a {T4C_TOOL} to knock it loose.
Ease the {T4A_TOOL} and free the capsule...
Shove it through hard and fast.
Cradle the freed capsule and back out.
Send the capsule to the station.
Close the branch valves one by one.
Bank the pressure behind the jam.
Track the freed capsule down the board.
Send the {T4C_TOOL} hard, one shot to se...
Search the board for any sign of the cap...
